data.title: SN BioScience's 'SNB-101' anti-cancer drug granted US FDA Orphan Drug Designation for gastric cancer, Dec 10, 2025. CEO Young Hwan PARK announced it.
data.description: In Seongnam, South Korea, on December 23, 2025, SN Bioscience Inc. confirmed that the FDA awarded Orphan Drug Designation (ODD) on December 10 for gastric cancer, encompassing gastroesophageal junction cancer, to SNB-101 (containing SN-38). The company's CEO, Young Hwan PARK, revealed this significant milestone for their polymer-based treatment. The approval underscores the potential of SNB-101 in addressing a rare medical need, reflecting a pivotal moment in the company's commitment to advancing cancer care.

data.title: Headwall Investments bought Sunset Ridge Shopping Center in San Antonio, TX on Dec 23, 2025.
data.description: A commercial real estate investment and development firm called Headwall Investments, based in San Antonio, successfully completed the off-market purchase of Sunset Ridge Shopping Center. Specializing in neighborhood shopping centers and urban infill projects, the Texas-based firm finalized the acquisition on December 23, 2025.

data.title: Buenaventura produces first dore bar at San Gabriel gold operation in Peru. Milestone achieved as per planned timeline.
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Compañia de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (BVN) revealed that its new gold operation, San Gabriel in Moquegua, has generated its initial dore bar during commissioning tests, staying on schedule. The company, Peru's primary publicly-traded precious metals mining firm, is advancing towards finalizing agreements with the Min.

data.title: Globe Life Inc. forms Bermuda reinsurance affiliate Globe Life Re Ltd. as Class C Insurer.
data.description: In McKinney, Texas on December 23, 2025, a United States based holding company focusing on life and supplemental health insurance, Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL), shared that its subsidiary, Globe Life Re Ltd. (the Company), has been established and approved as a Bermuda Class C Insurer.

data.title: New play "We Three Kings" debuts off-Broadway on Dec. 10, 2025, exploring faith and redemption.
data.description: A recent Off-Broadway premiere at The Theater Center in New York on December 10, 2025, showcased a captivating play by Solon Phillips titled We Three Kings: The Story Behind the Story. This original piece delves into themes of faith, loss, and redemption through a unique human perspective on the Magi. Since its debut, the play has garnered significant interest, with viewers praising its innovative take on the classic tale.

data.title: FCPT buys an Olive Garden property in Illinois for $2.2 million in a corporate-operated, long-term lease deal.
data.description: Based in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT) recently acquired an Olive Garden property for $2.2 million. The property, situated in a bustling area in Illinois, operates under a corporate-owned long-term triple net lease with roughly eight years remaining. FCPT is a real estate investment trust that focuses on owning and obtaining top-tier, net-leased restaurant and retail properties.

data.title: Pelthos Therapeutics appoints Andrew Einhorn to its board, leveraging his 40+ years of expertise in finance and life sciences.
data.description: An experienced executive with over 40 years of expertise in finance, capital markets, and life sciences has joined the team.

data.title: Motive Technologies files for IPO with SEC for Class A common stock, plans to list on NYSE as "MTVE." Shares and price TBD.
data.description: In San Francisco, Motive Technologies, Inc., a leading AI platform for physical operations, revealed plans for an initial public offering of its Class A common stock. The company filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the US Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC") for the offering. Motive intends to list its Class A common stock on the New York Stock Exchange using the symbol "MTVE." Details such as the number of shares to be offered and the price range for the potential offering have not been disclosed yet.
ROK: Vehicle acquisition tax to be reduced until end of June next year... Fuel tax cut also extended by two months

data.title: QGold closed $1.69M flow-through financing, issuing Common Shares. Check SEDAR+ for further details.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Q-Gold Resources Ltd. completed its non-brokered private placement financing of common shares on a “flow-through” basis, raising $1,694,503. The company, listed on the TSXV as QGR, OTCQB as QGLDF, and Börse Frankfurt as QX9G, expressed satisfaction with the outcome of the offering. Further details about the transaction can be found in the press release from December 12, 2025, accessible on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP plans to repurchase shares through a normal course issuer bid. TSX has approved their notice.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 23, 2025, American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP (AHIP) disclosed that the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) has approved its intention to proceed with a normal course issuer bid (NCIB). AHIP is listed under symbols TSX: HOT.UN, TSX: HOT.U, TSX: HOT.DB.V.
